# Show Keyboard Shortcuts

Output the complete keyboard shortcut reference for this workspace.

## All Custom Chord Keybindings

> These are defined in `~/Library/Application Support/Code/User/keybindings.json`.
> All `cmd+a` bindings are scoped to `workspaceFolderBasename == 'iron-static'` and are inert in other workspaces.

### `cmd+a` тАФ Copilot Agent & Chat Management

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `cmd+a cmd+a` | New chat session |
| `cmd+a cmd+h` | Chat history picker |
| `cmd+a cmd+q` | Quick chat popup |
| `cmd+a cmd+f` | Focus chat panel |
| `cmd+a cmd+e` | Open Copilot Edits view |
| `cmd+a 1` | Open **The Arranger** agent file |
| `cmd+a 2` | Open **The Sound Designer** agent file |
| `cmd+a 3` | Open **The Theorist** agent file |
| `cmd+a 4` | Open **The Critic** agent file |
| `cmd+a 5` | Open **The Live Engineer** agent file |
| `cmd+a 6` | Open **The Alchemist** agent file |
| `cmd+a 7` | Open **The Publicist** agent file |
| `cmd+a 8` | Open **The Visual Artist** agent file |
| `cmd+a 9` | Open **The Mix Engineer** agent file |

> **Note**: `cmd+a [1-9]` opens the agent's `.agent.md` file in the editor. To activate the agent in chat, attach the file with `#` or switch via the `@` dropdown тАФ VS Code has no command to do this programmatically.

### `cmd+w` тАФ Workspace Management

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `cmd+w cmd+w` | Close active editor / terminal / window / group (context-aware) |
| `cmd+w cmd+f` | Add root folder to workspace |
| `cmd+w cmd+s` | Save workspace as... |
| `cmd+w cmd+c` | Close folder / collapse explorer / collapse problems tree (context-aware) |
| `cmd+w cmd+o` | Open workspace / GitLens open in new window (context-aware) |
| `cmd+w cmd+r` | Remove root folder |
| `cmd+w cmd+,` | Open workspace settings |

### `cmd+b` тАФ Sidebar Toggles

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `cmd+b cmd+l` | Toggle sidebar visibility |
| `cmd+b cmd+r` | Toggle auxiliary bar (right panel) |

### `cmd+e` тАФ Editor & Explorer

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `cmd+e cmd+e` | Show Explorer view |
| `cmd+e cmd+h` | Toggle editor visibility |
| `cmd+e cmd+p` | Show Problems panel |

### `cmd+j` тАФ Panel

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `cmd+j cmd+j` | Toggle panel (show/hide) |
| `cmd+j cmd+m` | Toggle maximized panel |

### `cmd+g` тАФ Git / GitLens

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `cmd+g cmd+b` | Toggle file blame (GitLens) |

### `cmd+l` тАФ Copilot Model

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `cmd+l cmd+l` | Open Copilot model picker |

### `cmd+m` тАФ Markdown

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `cmd+m cmd+d` | Markdown preview (active for `.md`, `.prompt.md`, `.agent.md`, `.skill.md`) |

### `cmd+s` тАФ Save

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `cmd+s` | Save active file |
| `shift+cmd+s` | Save all files |

### Terminal

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `shift+enter` | Send `\` + newline (continue command on next line) |
| `ctrl+enter` | Send `\` + newline (continue command on next line) |
